title: DeFi Infrastructure Economy ranking
source_note: Top 30 EVM chains by TVL from DeFiLlama snapshot 2026-03-07. Atlas publishes source-backed metrics when available and preserves the last valid snapshot otherwise.

modules.name: Liquid Staking Infrastructure
modules.rationale: Staked assets can already stay productive inside DeFi flows, which improves capital efficiency and supports a stronger TVL narrative.
modules.evidence_note: Seeded demo assessment: For Ethereum, liquid staking infrastructure is treated as available for the DeFi benchmark.

modules.name: Lending Infrastructure
modules.rationale: Reusable borrowing and collateral rails are already strong enough to support lending-led DeFi growth without foundational rework.
modules.evidence_note: Seeded demo assessment: For Ethereum, lending infrastructure is treated as available for the DeFi benchmark.

modules.name: Liquidity Layer
modules.rationale: Pool and routing support are already credible enough to underpin swaps, TVL formation, and protocol launch confidence.
modules.evidence_note: Seeded demo assessment: For Ethereum, liquidity rails are treated as available for the DeFi benchmark.

modules.name: Oracle Infrastructure
modules.rationale: Reference data coverage is strong enough to support price-sensitive DeFi protocols without major ecosystem-level blockers.
modules.evidence_note: Seeded demo assessment: For Ethereum, oracle infrastructure is treated as available for the DeFi benchmark.

modules.name: Indexing Layer
modules.rationale: Queryable protocol and position data are already strong enough to support analytics, dashboards, and ecosystem operations.
modules.evidence_note: Seeded demo assessment: For Ethereum, indexing infrastructure is treated as available for the DeFi benchmark.

modules.name: Liquid Staking Infrastructure
modules.rationale: Some liquid staking support exists, but it still needs better standardization and protocol integrations before it becomes a first-class chain primitive.
modules.evidence_note: Seeded demo assessment: For Arbitrum, liquid staking infrastructure is treated as partially available for the DeFi benchmark.
